item.title: A sufficiently comprehensive spec is not (necessarily) code 摘要
item.description:
The article argues that a comprehensive specification is not equivalent to code, as a spec represents a set of possible implementations while code is a single instance within that set. It explains that specifications are abstractions of code, where more precise specs reduce the set of valid programs. The author contends that even with AI tools like Claude, programmers remain essential for writing formal specs, as non-programmers struggle with encoding specifications in formal languages. The distinction between spec and code is maintained as useful, with examples like test suites serving as encoded specifications.
标签: specification, programming, abstraction, AI, code generation, software development, formal methods, program synthesis, testing, requirements

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison introduces Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, a new text-to-speech model from Google, and provides his personal notes on it. He includes a link to his detailed analysis and tags the article with 'gemini' and 'google'.
标签: Gemini, Google, TTS, text-to-speech, AI, speech synthesis, machine learning, technology, tools, Simon Willison

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 摘要
item.description:
Google released Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, a new text-to-speech model accessible via the Gemini API using the model ID gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview. It generates audio files based on detailed prompts that specify audio profiles, scenes, director's notes, and transcripts, allowing control over style, dynamics, pace, and accent. The article includes example prompts for accents like London, Newcastle, and Devon, and mentions a web UI built with Gemini 3.1 Pro for testing the model.
标签: Google, text-to-speech, tools, AI, prompt-engineering, generative-AI, LLMs, Gemini, LLM-release, vibe-coding

item.title: Quoting John Gruber 摘要
item.description:
The article argues that Apple's key advantage lies not in App Store revenue but in having the best apps, which attract users to its platforms. However, this edge is diminishing as third-party software on Apple devices declines in quality. Fewer developers are motivated to create well-crafted, native apps exclusively for Apple's ecosystems due to reduced artistic or financial incentives.
标签: Apple, App Store, iOS, Android, mobile apps, developer ecosystem, platform strategy, software quality, John Gruber, tech analysis

item.title: Speed is Not Conducive to Wisdom 摘要
item.description:
The article critiques modern society's obsession with speed, arguing that it hinders wisdom. Speed allows people to avoid reflection and learning from mistakes, as wisdom requires slow, uncomfortable experiences like having opinions dismantled by reality. Wise individuals appear unhurried because they understand that important processes cannot be rushed, and wisdom's feedback loop is inherently slow, but people move too fast to learn from it.
标签: philosophy, wisdom, reflection, modern-society, learning, speed, personal-growth, culture, productivity, mindfulness

item.title: Lisa Melton: ‘Memories of Steve’ (and Memories of Safari’s Unique Page-Loading Indicator in Particular) 摘要
item.description:
Lisa Melton, who led the Safari development team, shares two key insights from working with Steve Jobs. First, when asked a question, one should avoid rambling or making up answers; instead, admit if you don't know and commit to finding out by a specific time. Second, she recounts a collaborative moment with Jobs where they decided to place Safari's progress bar inside the URL address field after removing the status bar, debunking a prior claim that Steve Lemay invented this feature. Melton's direct account highlights the importance of honesty in communication and the creative problem-solving process at Apple.
标签: Steve Jobs, Safari, Apple, leadership, communication, UI design, progress bar, collaboration, history, anecdote

item.title: Writing an LLM from scratch, part 32k -- Interventions: training a better model locally with gradient accumulation 摘要
item.description:
The author trained a GPT-2-small-style LLM based on Sebastian Raschka's book, comparing cloud and local training. They found that increasing batch size from 6 to 96 improved model loss more than all other interventions combined, highlighting batch size's critical role in training quality. To match cloud performance locally with limited GPU memory, they explain gradient accumulation: accumulating gradients over multiple forward-backward passes before optimizer updates, which stabilizes training like larger batches but requires scaling loss to average gradients correctly.
标签: AI, LLM, training, batch-size, gradient-accumulation, deep-learning, PyTorch, optimization, GPU, machine-learning

item.title: Our options in remote server installation and management 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses remote server management challenges for Ubuntu LTS servers in an inconvenient location, focusing on reinstallation needs. It evaluates three solutions: full BMC support with KVM over IP (ideal but often unavailable due to cost or hardware limitations), network booting (technically correct but labor-intensive to set up), and external KVM over IP systems (general and easy to implement, though more expensive upfront). The author notes that at a university, staff time is often treated as a sunk cost, potentially favoring network booting despite higher labor requirements.
标签: server-management, remote-access, KVM-over-IP, network-booting, Ubuntu, BMC, IT-infrastructure, system-administration, datacenter, cost-analysis
